channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Wooden Pallet, 20th June
item.description:
Dumped around 0120am , side camera caught it being left but didnt pick out anyone as they out of shot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Kempton Grove, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 20th June
item.description:
Graffiti on the windows as Royal Well Stop D

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Well Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No streetlights working for the full stretch of road and hence the cycle path and bus stop are pitch black and dangerous, 20th June
item.description:
A435 between The Hyde lane traffic lights and the roundabout at the north entrance to GE
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches impeding pavement, 19th June
item.description:
Some branches of the tree directly outside 24 Keynsham Road are now so long that pedestrians need to duck under them as they walk past the tree - there's barely 1.5m clearance from the pavement to the lowest branches

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Keynsham Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Impaired visibility, 19th June
item.description:
The verge on the right hand side as you reach the chicane travelling from Gotherington. Visibility is impaired. The verges have been cut but not very well because drivers reaching the chicane going southwards still can’t see because the grass was cut in sufficient area .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gotherington Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction obscured by tree or foliage, 19th June
item.description:
Turning out of Hartley Lane onto Leckhampton Hill, a difficult emerge, the view assisted when using the convex mirror is obscured quite severely by foliage. If traveling towards Ullenwood from Cheltenham, the foliage is on the left a few metres from the Hartley Lane T-junction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartley Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole causing noise when cars being driven over, 19th June
item.description:
Outside 32 orchard avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36;38, Orchard Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement along driveway, 19th June
item.description:
Outside number 7 craven drive, pavement is crumbling away and allowing weeds to grow through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Craven Drive, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Pavement is severely damaged, with rocking slabs and damaged kerbs., 19th June
item.description:
The damage is worse in front of 12, 12a, 14
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Mendip Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dip on pavement after removing grown up grass, 19th June
item.description:
Outside number 7 oakhurst dip in pavment after taking grown up Grass and soil away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakhurst Close, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several empty nitrous oxides canisters and associated cardboard boxes dumped at the side of the track., 19th June
item.description:
This rubbish was first spotted on Tuesday, 16th June and was still there this morning, Friday 19th.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queenwood Grove, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three broken slabs outside 81, 19th June
item.description:
There are three broken slabs that are sticking up outside number 81. The are a lot of elderly people living in the area that this is a falls risk
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 132, Brooklyn Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes, 19th June
item.description:
Large pothole on the parking bays and roads outside of the Farnley Lodge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Douro Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 19th June
item.description:
The tree is obstructing the footway, and overhanging the property. This tree is likely in need of some TLC as it is old and not been maintained for a while from residents knowledge.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th June
item.description:
28day with road closure CW pothole approx 600x400x40mm perm repair unmarked due to traffic volume. (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tree (not the pine tree) at the rear of my property on council land needs to be removed, 19th June
item.description:
Land at the rear of my property in Keynsham Bank maintained by you This issue as you can see from the photo needs resolving asap this was reported previously. Over several years. There are saplings and ivy strangulating a Pine Tree ( I would like this tree to remain if it is safe to do so? Please contact me to discuss your plan of action by email thanks Thank you Please contact me to discuss further by email

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southfield Approach, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th June
item.description:
28day with 3 way stop and go CW pothole 700x550x60mm perm repair (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 19th June
item.description:
Customer reporting tree branch has fallen from tree and almost hit her daughter. It did hit a car too.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 19th June
item.description:
Customer calling as a tree branch has fallen from the tree and it almost hit her daughter. It has also hit a car.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 19th June
item.description:
28day with 2 way traffic lights lift and reset rocking cover in CW STATS (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet
